title: nie-daemon types: DaemonEvent enum + DaemonError enum
description:
**What:** Define the DaemonEvent enum (all browser WebSocket event types tagged with 'type') and DaemonError typed error enum used throughout nie-daemon.

**Algorithm:**
1. Create daemon/src/types.rs
2. Define struct UserInfo { pub_id: String, display_name: String, sequence: u64 } with Serialize+Deserialize+Clone
3. Define DaemonEvent enum with #[serde(tag='type', rename_all='snake_case')], Serialize+Clone:
   - MessageReceived { from: String, from_display_name: String, text: String, timestamp: String, message_id: String }
   - UserJoined { pub_id: String, display_name: String, sequence: u64, timestamp: String }
   - UserLeft { pub_id: String, display_name: String, timestamp: String }
   - DirectoryUpdated { online: Vec<UserInfo>, offline: Vec<UserInfo>, timestamp: String }
   - MlsStateChanged { active: bool, epoch: u64, timestamp: String }
   - ConnectionStateChanged { status: String, relay_url: String, timestamp: String }
   - PaymentUpdate { session_id: String, peer_pub_id: String, peer_display_name: String, state: String, action: String, chain: String, amount_zatoshi: u64, timestamp: String }
4. Define DaemonError with thiserror: Config(#[from] std::io::Error), RelayConnect(String), Auth(String), Serialize(#[from] serde_json::Error), WalletNotInitialized
5. Add thiserror to daemon/Cargo.toml deps
6. Add pub mod types; and pub use types::*; to daemon/src/lib.rs

**Defensive programming rules:**
- DaemonEvent must not contain key material fields (signing keys, HPKE secrets)
- All struct fields use owned String (not &str) — required for Send+Sync over broadcast channel
- timestamp field uses ISO 8601 UTC format: chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339() produces '2026-04-19T14:30:00Z'

**Agent team:** Single Implementer. Validator runs cargo test + clippy after.

**Tests (independent oracle: serde tag values defined in this code, verified by reading JSON output):**
- test_daemon_event_message_type: serialize MessageReceived, verify serde_json output has type='message_received'
- test_daemon_event_user_joined_type: serialize UserJoined, verify type='user_joined'
- test_daemon_event_roundtrip: serialize then deserialize MessageReceived, verify fields unchanged
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-daemon passes; all serde tag tests pass; cargo clippy -- -D warnings exits 0
close_reason: DaemonEvent+DaemonError types implemented, serde tag tests pass
